issues.title: BedrockCohereEmbeddingOptions does not implement EmbeddingOptions
issues.body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/discussions/381
Originally posted by **sharathcshekhar** March 1, 2024 In the documentation to use Cohere embeddings, https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/embeddings/bedrock-cohere-embedding.html#embedding-options, the below code example is provided. ``` EmbeddingResponse embeddingResponse = embeddingClient.call( new EmbeddingRequest(List.of("Hello World", "World is big and salvation is near"), BedrockCohereEmbeddingOptions.builder() .withInputType(InputType.SEARCH_DOCUMENT) .build())); ``` But this code does not work because BedrockCohereEmbeddingOptions does not implement EmbeddingOptions. I am on 0.8.0. Is there something I am missing? Thanks.
